# HomeSurvey.ai — Product Updates

> AI-powered virtual moving survey platform. This site hosts product announcements, feature releases, improvements, and fixes.

## Main Site
- [HomeSurvey.ai](https://homesurvey.ai): AI-powered virtual moving surveys — from video walkthrough to estimate-ready inventory in under 30 minutes.

## Product Updates

- [All Updates](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/): Searchable, filterable listing of all product announcements. Supports keyword search and article type filtering (Feature, Improvement, Sample, Fix, Integration).

- [Your Inventory, Your Call](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/inventory-control-photos-appendix/): New Feature (Customer-Driven) — five inventory upgrades from one working mover's punch list: Sync Weight & Volume checkbox for independent weight override (item header and AI summary show the override), tag-based item filtering, selectable item photos (video frame / gallery / camera — fixes random photos on manual items), and a tag-driven Photos Appendix in the survey PDF (Settings → Organization → PDF Image Tags, e.g. Heavy or Pre-existing Damage; paid plans). Fixes: HVI and pro-gear count mismatches, persistent deletions from search, correct categorization of TVs, lamps, mirrors, artwork.

- [Sweat the Small Stuff](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/june-2026-roundup/): Improvement (June Roundup) — failed room uploads get a Retry button on the failed item itself; ready-for-review emails now carry complexity score, crew size, total hours, and the AI summary's key bullets (HomeSurvey.ai + CRM); the survey welcome screen shows the mover's logo and sales rep name. Also: PDF download prompt after review, cleaner PDF footer number formatting, questionnaire FAQs, None move-type option.

- [Sent the Link? You Can Still Fix It.](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/edit-survey-info-after-send/): New Feature — every survey now has an Edit Survey Info action: fix customer name, email, address, internal note, and survey note after the link is sent, with the link still working (no void-and-resend). Move type deliberately locks at send. The Generate Survey Link form adds an optional survey address field. A rebuilt first-run experience takes new accounts from signup to first survey in 90 seconds: guided first run, no empty states, in-product help. Also: long video uploads no longer fail when browser storage fills mid-upload.

- [Military Moves, By the Book](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/military-moves-pro-gear-pdf/): New Feature (Military) — dedicated Military Move flag on the Generate Survey Link form, plus a Pro-Gear PDF generated from the survey: every PBP&E item weighed and itemized with totals against the 2,000 lb member / 500 lb spouse allowances, ready for the move file. Same PDF generates in Movegistics CRM; pro-gear counts agree across AI summary, header stats, and dashboard filters.

- [The Margin Is in the Clutter](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/accuracy-upgrade-garage-kitchen/): Improvement — Accuracy upgrade for the AI virtual moving survey, focused on the high-clutter rooms. Nearly 100 new item types led by garage and kitchen, 15-23% more items captured per home, 20%+ sharper exclusions, and cross-video duplicate detection. Side-by-side on the same property: 320→394 items, 129→153 billable cartons (+24). Automatic on every new survey, no workflow changes.

- [Custom Questionnaire](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/custom-questionnaire/): New Feature — configure move-type-specific pre-survey questions with branching logic. 12 move types, 10 field types, cross-validation between customer answers and AI detections. Customer answers flow into the AI pipeline as hints and surface in the review dashboard.

- [Voice Notes with Auto Exclude](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/voice-notes-auto-exclude/): New Feature — during the video walkthrough, customers speak naturally about what stays and goes. The AI transcribes, classifies (GOES/STAYS/DISPOSE), and auto-excludes items. 8 note types, alias-aware matching, confidence scoring, blanket statement handling, silence detection.

- [Interactive AI Move Summary](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/interactive-ai-move-summary/): New Feature — AI generates a complete move playbook with crew size scenarios, truck counts, pack/load/unload hours, risk flags, and estimator tips. Recalculate button recomputes estimates from live inventory edits with transparent assumptions.

- [Every Room, Photographed. See a Real Report.](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/articles/sample-survey-report/): Improvement + Sample Report — survey reports now include a timestamped room-level photo for every space captured during the walkthrough. Browse a real 19-page AI output: 13 rooms, 126 items, 111 cartons, handling flags, AI room notes, and carton summary. Redacted for privacy, otherwise unmodified.

## More Information
- [How It Works](https://homesurvey.ai/how-it-works/): Step-by-step walkthrough of the HomeSurvey.ai process.
- [Full LLM Context](https://updates.homesurvey.ai/llms-full.txt): Detailed feature descriptions for each product update.
